carsales.dealer_comments: 1998 MITSUBISHI Pajero Mini | Petrol | 61,157 KM A compact and fun Mitsubishi Pajero Mini built for city driving, weekend use, and anyone wanting a small SUV with classic Pajero character. With petrol power, low kilometres for its age, and practical everyday features, this Pajero Mini is a unique little 4WD-style vehicle with great personality.
